subject: CRITICAL: 3 of 4 Production Lines Down — Immediate Action Required
body: Good morning. Urgent situation report as of 7am: WO-B01 (SKU-A, 300 units) halted at 20 units — RAW-001 hit zero overnight. WO-B02 (SKU-C, 200 units) cannot start — RAW-003 is completely exhausted. WO-B03 (SKU-B, 150 units) remains blocked waiting for RAW-001. WO-B04 (SKU-D) planned but cannot start without RAW-003. Total units at risk: 560 finished goods. Customer deadlines are May 3rd, May 5th and May 8th. We urgently need RAW-001 (minimum 1000 units), RAW-003 (minimum 800 units), and RAW-004 (minimum 600 units) to resume production.

subject: URGENT: No Delivery Schedule Received — Assembly Line at Risk
body: Hi YamaTech team, we have not received delivery confirmation for ORD-B01 (300 × SKU-A) and ORD-B02 (150 × SKU-B) despite our May 5th deadline being less than 3 weeks away. Our KL assembly line is scheduled to integrate these modules on May 6th. Any delay will shut down our line and trigger contractual penalties. We are also placing an emergency add-on order ORD-B05: 50 units of SKU-D needed by May 3rd for emergency replacement parts. Please escalate this internally and respond within the hour.

subject: RAW-003 Copper Winding Coil — Critically Limited Stock
body: Dear YamaTech, in response to your inquiry about Copper Winding Coil (RAW-003): we currently have only 350 units available at the current price of $8.75/unit. All stock is allocated on a first-come first-served basis. Our next shipment from the Chilean supplier is not expected until late May at a projected price of $11.20/unit due to ongoing port disruptions. We strongly recommend placing your purchase order today to secure your allocation. Please note we cannot guarantee availability beyond today.

subject: RAW-004 Tempered Glass Panel — No Stock Until Late May
body: Dear YamaTech, we regret to confirm that our Tempered Glass Panel (RAW-004) inventory is fully depleted and our manufacturing furnace repair is ongoing. We do not expect new stock availability until late May at the earliest. We recommend contacting ClearTech Glass Supply as an alternative supplier. They produce a compatible SKU-A-grade panel with a 10-12 day lead time at approximately $22.50/unit. We sincerely apologize for the disruption to your production.

subject: INVESTOR DEADLINE MOVED — Delivery Cannot Slip
body: Hi YamaTech, critical update: our investor showcase has been moved forward to May 9th. We MUST have all SKU-C and SKU-D units delivered and installed by May 8th. Any delay will result in us invoking the late delivery penalty clause in our contract (15% of total order value = $40,500). Additionally, we are considering sourcing from an alternative supplier if we do not receive a confirmed delivery schedule within 48 hours. Please advise immediately whether you can meet this deadline.
